name: IT E-Commerce Platform (bechtle.com)
description: Online procurement platform for IT products offering over 100,000 items from 300+ manufacturers. Provides enterprise customers with personalized catalogs, approval workflows, procurement system integration (OCI/Punchout), and volume pricing. Serves as a self-service channel complementing the system house business.
differentiators: One of Europe's largest B2B IT e-commerce platforms
ERP/procurement system integration (SAP Ariba, Coupa, etc.)
Personalized customer catalogs with contracted pricing
